allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\work\\base-boot\\pom.xml"\); if \($bytes.Length -ge 3 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { Write-Output "UTF-8 with BOM" } elseif \($bytes.Length -ge 2 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xFF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xFE\) { Write-Output "UTF-16 LE" } elseif \($bytes.Length -ge 2 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xFE -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xFF\) { Write-Output "UTF-16 BE" } else { Write-Output "UTF-8 without BOM \(or other\)" }; Write-Output "File size: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\work\\base-boot" -Filter "pom.xml" -Recurse -Depth 4; $bad = @\(\); $good = @\(\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f.FullName\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($raw\); if \($text -match '[一-鿿]'\) { $good += $f.FullName } else { $containsChineseBytes = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $raw.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($raw[$i] -ge 0xE0 -and $raw[$i] -le 0xEF -and $raw[$i+1] -ge 0x80\) { $containsChineseBytes = $true; break } } if \($containsChineseBytes\) { $bad += $f.FullName } } }; Write-Output "=== GOOD \(correct Chinese\) ==="; $good; Write-Output "`n=== BAD \(garbled Chinese\) ==="; $bad)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\work\\base-boot\\pom.xml"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $idx = $text.IndexOf\('榛'\); if \($idx -gt 0\) { $before = $text.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 20\), [Math]::Min\(40, $text.Length - [Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 20\)\)\); Write-Output "Context: $before"; $rawBytes = $bytes[[Math]::Max\(0, $idx-20\)..[Math]::Min\($bytes.Length-1, $idx+40\)]; $hex = [BitConverter]::ToString\($rawBytes\); Write-Output "Raw bytes: $hex"; $gbk = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\('GBK'\); $decodedGbk = $gbk.GetString\($rawBytes\); Write-Output "Decoded as GBK: $decodedGbk" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\work\\base-boot\\i18n\\locales\\en_US.json"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); if \($text -match '\\b\(drug|healthbrain|health_brain|brain\)\\b'\) { Write-Output "Found" } else { Write-Output "No healthbrain/drug keys in en_US i18n" })
